prompt.prompt_text:
You are analyzing a television commercial for corpus-linguistic and multimodal discourse analysis.

You are given sampled frames from a video clip. The frames are in chronological order.
Treat the frames as a temporal sequence from one commercial, not as independent images.

Describe the visual content of the commercial as it unfolds over time.
Describe only what is visually supported by the frames.

Do not guess dialogue, slogans, music, voice-over, or other audio content.
If something is unclear or not visible in the sampled frames, say so.

output.response_text:
The commercial is shown in black and white, with a visible “Nostalgic X’er” watermark at the lower right of the sampled frames.

At the beginning, the frame shows a dark graphic emblem resembling a large letter “Q.” Inside the circular form is a simplified silhouette of a figure’s head and shoulders, visually similar to the Quaker Oats icon. The image is centered against a dark background.

Later, the scene changes to a kitchen stovetop. A pot sits on a burner, filled with a boiling or steaming liquid. Steam rises visibly from the pot. Other circular stovetop elements are visible around it, suggesting a domestic cooking setting.

The next sampled scene shows a young boy seated in a kitchen. Cabinets and drawers are visible behind him. He appears to be eating with a spoon, leaning forward over the table or counter. His expression suggests he is focused on eating, but the exact food is not visible in this frame.

The final frame shows two cylindrical product containers side by side. The left container is labeled “QUAKER OATS” and includes an image of the Quaker figure. The right container is labeled “MOTHER’S OATS” and includes an illustration of a woman and child. Both containers are presented front-facing, as a product display shot.
